---
title: "Definition"
format: html
jupyter: python3
highlight-style: default
code-block-bg: "#000000"
---
\
\

### System Parameters

| PARAMETER | MEANING               | VALUE               |
|-----------|-----------------------|---------------------|
| n         | sample                | $(20, 30, 40)$      |
| N         | batch                 | $200$               |
| k         | defects/batch         | $(2, 4, 6)$         |
| $C_m$     | production cost/bulb  | $\$2.00^*$          |
| $C_d$     | loss per bad bulb     | $100C_m^{**}$       |
| $P_b$     | profit per good bulb  | $\$1.00^*$          |
 
: Parameters {tbl-colwidths="[25, 50, 25]"}

1. $^*$ [This](https://share.gemini.google/P9fhcrHCEaKR) Gemini conversation used to derive cost parameters for lightbulbs. As these estimates are generated by AI, exercise caution in using them as something other than proof-of-concept guesses for model formulation.

1. $^{**}$ [This article](https://9001-2026.com/blogs/cost-of-poor-quality) was used to estimate the maximum cost of bad bulb in terms of regular production cost.
